title: Releases | Beehive.govt.nz
content:
## Condolences on passing of Henry Kissinger
Foreign Minister Winston Peters today expressed on behalf of the New Zealand Government his condolences to the family of former US Secretary of State Henry Kissinger.

## Backing our kids to learn the basics
Every child deserves a world-leading education, and the Coalition Government is making that a priority as part of its 100-day plan.

## Coalition Government unveils 100-day plan
Prime Minister Christopher Luxon has laid out the Coalition Government’s plan for its first 100 days from today.
For content from previous governments, use the Advanced Search .
